title: NEET UG 2025 — AIQ Round 1 Registration Opens
body: Register for MCC All India Quota Round 1 counselling at mcc.nic.in. Upload documents, pay security deposit.

title: AIQ Round 1 — Choice Filling Deadline
body: Lock your preferred colleges and courses before the deadline. Choices cannot be modified after this date.

title: AIQ Round 1 — Seat Allotment Result
body: Check your allotment status on mcc.nic.in. Report to allotted college within the specified window.

title: Maharashtra State Counselling — Registration Opens
body: DMER Maharashtra state quota registration for NEET qualified students. Apply at cetcell.mahacet.org.

title: AIQ Round 2 — Choice Filling Window
body: Second round choice filling for AIQ seats. Fresh choices required — previous round preferences do not carry forward.
